creator: dhorn2000@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the update to the latest upstream, works much better now.

 Latest commit at least now gives a useful error message with regards to the environment variable needed to be successful. I will continue to pull the thread on the root issue to see if we can make this "just work" without setting environment variables at make or runtime.  I'm currently experimenting with /etc/ssl/openssl.cnf and security/py-cryptography knobs to see if there is an easy fix.  Hitting up folks on #freebsd-python IRC as well.

All else fails, I will put in another bug report for security/py-cryptography.

Thanks again!

-_Dave
